sentences.english: Describe a celebration or event you attended that was enjoyable.
The most enjoyable celebration I attended was my best friend's surprise birthday party last year.
sentences.korean: 내가 참석한 가장 즐거운 축하는 작년 가장 친한 친구의 깜짝 생일 파티였어요.

sentences.english: About twenty of us gathered at a rooftop restaurant and decorated it with fairy lights and balloons before she arrived.
sentences.korean: 약 20명이 옥상 레스토랑에 모여 그녀가 도착하기 전에 조명과 풍선으로 장식했어요.

sentences.english: When she walked in and saw everyone she was so shocked that she burst into tears of joy.
sentences.korean: 들어와서 모두를 봤을 때 너무 놀라서 기쁨의 눈물을 터뜨렸어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: A Hobby You Want to Start

sentences.english: What made it special was the sense of community — everyone contributed something whether it was food music or decorations.
sentences.korean: 특별하게 만든 것은 공동체 의식이었어요 — 음식이든 음악이든 장식이든 모두가 기여했어요.

sentences.english: It reminded me that the best celebrations aren't about expensive venues — they're about the people you share them with.
sentences.korean: 최고의 축하는 비싼 장소가 아니라 함께하는 사람이라는 것을 상기시켜줬어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
